DataCalcInsightTemplate.builderExpression: {"version":"2.0","app":{"insightType":"CALCULATED_METRIC","targetCurrencyType":"USD"},"dataNodes":{"LOAD_DATA_SOURCE0":{"id":"LOAD_DATA_SOURCE0","action":"load","parameters":{"dataset":{"label":"Individual","name":"ssot__Individual__dlm","creationType":"Standard","isExternal":false,"isExternalObjectInErrorStatus":false,"type":"dmo"},"fields":["ssot__Id__c","KQ_Id__c"],"projectedFields":[],"dataGraphSourcePathToPrimary":[]},"sources":[]},"LOAD_DATA_SOURCE1":{"id":"LOAD_DATA_SOURCE1","action":"load","parameters":{"dataset":{"label":"Unified Link Individual RISK","name":"UnifiedLinkssotIndividualRisk__dlm","creationType":"Bridge","isExternal":false,"type":"dmo"},"fields":["SourceRecordId__c","KQ_SourceRecordId__c","UnifiedRecordId__c"],"projectedFields":[],"dataGraphSourcePathToPrimary":[]},"sources":[]},"JOIN0":{"id":"JOIN0","action":"join","parameters":{"joinType":"inner","leftKeys":["ssot__Id__c","KQ_Id__c"],"rightQualifier":"UnifiedLinkIndividualRISK","rightKeys":["SourceRecordId__c","KQ_SourceRecordId__c"]},"sources":["LOAD_DATA_SOURCE0","LOAD_DATA_SOURCE1"]},"LOAD_DATA_SOURCE2":{"id":"LOAD_DATA_SOURCE2","action":"load","parameters":{"dataset":{"label":"Unified Individual RISK","name":"UnifiedssotIndividualRisk__dlm","creationType":"Derived","isExternal":false,"type":"dmo"},"fields":["ssot__Id__c"],"projectedFields":[],"dataGraphSourcePathToPrimary":[]},"sources":[]},"JOIN1":{"id":"JOIN1","action":"join","parameters":{"joinType":"inner","leftKeys":["UnifiedLinkIndividualRISK.UnifiedRecordId__c"],"rightQualifier":"UnifiedIndividualRISK","rightKeys":["ssot__Id__c"]},"sources":["JOIN0","LOAD_DATA_SOURCE2"]},"LOAD_DATA_SOURCE3":{"id":"LOAD_DATA_SOURCE3","action":"load","parameters":{"dataset":{"label":"Banking Transaction","name":"Banking_Transaction__dlm","creationType":"Custom","isExternal":false,"type":"dmo"},"fields":["Customer_Key__c","Amount__c","Class__c"],"projectedFields":[],"dataGraphSourcePathToPrimary":[]},"sources":[]},"JOIN2":{"id":"JOIN2","action":"join","parameters":{"joinType":"inner","leftKeys":["ssot__Id__c"],"rightKeys":["Customer_Key__c"],"rightQualifier":"Banking"},"sources":["JOIN1","LOAD_DATA_SOURCE3"]},"LOAD_DATA_SOURCE4":{"id":"LOAD_DATA_SOURCE4","action":"load","parameters":{"dataset":{"label":"Insurance Claim","name":"Insurance_Claim__dlm","creationType":"Custom","isExternal":false,"type":"dmo"},"fields":["Customer_Key__c","Days_Policy_Claim__c","AddressChange_Claim__c","PoliceReportFiled__c","WitnessPresent__c","PastNumberOfClaims__c"],"projectedFields":[],"dataGraphSourcePathToPrimary":[]},"sources":[]},"JOIN3":{"id":"JOIN3","action":"join","parameters":{"joinType":"inner","leftKeys":["ssot__Id__c"],"rightKeys":["Customer_Key__c"],"rightQualifier":"Insurance"},"sources":["JOIN2","LOAD_DATA_SOURCE4"]},"CASE0":{"id":"CASE0","action":"case","parameters":{"cases":[{"name":"Rule_1_Banking_Anomaly_Flag","label":"Rule 1 Banking Anomaly Flag","returnValueType":"number","whenConditions":[{"expression":{"expressionType":"group","expressionValues":[{"expressionType":"condition","leftOperand":{"resourceType":"field","valueType":"text","source":"JOIN3","value":"Banking.Amount__c","dataType":"number"},"operator":"greater_or_equal","rightOperands":[{"resourceType":"constant","value":1065.67,"valueType":"number"}]},{"expressionType":"operator","operator":"and"},{"expressionType":"condition","leftOperand":{"resourceType":"field","valueType":"text","source":"JOIN3","value":"Insurance.Days_Policy_Claim__c","dataType":"text"},"operator":"not","rightOperands":[{"resourceType":"constant","value":"more than 30","valueType":"text"}]}]},"returnValue":{"resourceType":"constant","value":1,"valueType":"number"}}],"elseCondition":{"returnValue":{"resourceType":"constant","value":0,"valueType":"number"}}}]},"sources":["JOIN3"]},"CASE1":{"id":"CASE1","action":"case","parameters":{"cases":[{"name":"Rule_2_Identity_Instability_Flag","label":"Rule 2 Identity Instability Flag","returnValueType":"number","whenConditions":[{"expression":{"expressionType":"group","expressionValues":[{"expressionType":"condition","leftOperand":{"resourceType":"field","valueType":"text","source":"CASE0","value":"Banking.Class__c","dataType":"number"},"operator":"equal","rightOperands":[{"resourceType":"constant","value":1,"valueType":"number"}]},{"expressionType":"operator","operator":"and"},{"expressionType":"group","expressionValues":[{"expressionType":"condition","leftOperand":{"resourceType":"field","valueType":"text","source":"CASE0","value":"Insurance.AddressChange_Claim__c","dataType":"text"},"operator":"equal","rightOperands":[{"resourceType":"constant","value":"under 6 months","valueType":"text"}]},{"expressionType":"operator","operator":"or"},{"expressionType":"condition","leftOperand":{"resourceType":"field","valueType":"text","source":"CASE0","value":"Insurance.AddressChange_Claim__c","dataType":"text"},"operator":"equal","rightOperands":[{"resourceType":"constant","value":"1 year","valueType":"text"}]}]}]},"returnValue":{"resourceType":"constant","value":1,"valueType":"number"}}],"elseCondition":{"returnValue":{"resourceType":"constant","value":0,"valueType":"number"}}}]},"sources":["CASE0"]},"CASE2":{"id":"CASE2","action":"case","parameters":{"cases":[{"name":"Rule_3_Uncorroborated_Claim_Flag","label":"Rule 3 Uncorroborated Claim Flag","returnValueType":"number","whenConditions":[{"expression":{"expressionType":"group","expressionValues":[{"expressionType":"condition","leftOperand":{"resourceType":"field","valueType":"text","source":"CASE1","value":"Insurance.PoliceReportFiled__c","dataType":"text"},"operator":"equal","rightOperands":[{"resourceType":"constant","value":"No","valueType":"text"}]},{"expressionType":"operator","operator":"and"},{"expressionType":"condition","leftOperand":{"resourceType":"field","valueType":"text","source":"CASE1","value":"Insurance.WitnessPresent__c","dataType":"text"},"operator":"equal","rightOperands":[{"resourceType":"constant","value":"No","valueType":"text"}]},{"expressionType":"operator","operator":"and"},{"expressionType":"condition","leftOperand":{"resourceType":"field","valueType":"text","source":"CASE1","value":"Banking.Class__c","dataType":"number"},"operator":"equal","rightOperands":[{"resourceType":"constant","value":1,"valueType":"number"}]}]},"returnValue":{"resourceType":"constant","value":1,"valueType":"number"}}],"elseCondition":{"returnValue":{"resourceType":"constant","value":0,"valueType":"number"}}}]},"sources":["CASE1"]},"CASE3":{"id":"CASE3","action":"case","parameters":{"cases":[{"name":"Rule_4_Repeat_Pattern_Amplifier_Flag","label":"Rule 4 Repeat Pattern Amplifier Flag","returnValueType":"number","whenConditions":[{"expression":{"expressionType":"group","expressionValues":[{"expressionType":"condition","leftOperand":{"resourceType":"field","valueType":"text","source":"CASE2","value":"Insurance.PastNumberOfClaims__c","dataType":"text"},"operator":"equal","rightOperands":[{"resourceType":"constant","value":"more than 4","valueType":"text"}]},{"expressionType":"operator","operator":"and"},{"expressionType":"condition","leftOperand":{"resourceType":"field","valueType":"text","source":"CASE2","value":"Banking.Class__c","dataType":"number"},"operator":"equal","rightOperands":[{"resourceType":"constant","value":1,"valueType":"number"}]}]},"returnValue":{"resourceType":"constant","value":2,"valueType":"number"}}],"elseCondition":{"returnValue":{"resourceType":"constant","value":0,"valueType":"number"}}}]},"sources":["CASE2"]},"AGGREGATE0":{"id":"AGGREGATE0","action":"aggregate","parameters":{"measures":[{"name":"Sum_Rule1_Flag","label":"Sum_Rule1_Flag","functionName":"sum","parameters":{"expression":{"resourceType":"field","valueType":"text","value":"Rule_1_Banking_Anomaly_Flag","dataType":"number","source":"CASE3"}}},{"name":"Sum_Rule2_Flag","label":"Sum_Rule2_Flag","functionName":"sum","parameters":{"expression":{"resourceType":"field","valueType":"text","value":"Rule_2_Identity_Instability_Flag","dataType":"number","source":"CASE3"}}},{"name":"Sum_Rule3_Flag","label":"Sum_Rule3_Flag","functionName":"sum","parameters":{"expression":{"resourceType":"field","valueType":"text","value":"Rule_3_Uncorroborated_Claim_Flag","dataType":"number","source":"CASE3"}}},{"name":"Sum_Rule4_Flag","label":"Sum_Rule4_Flag","functionName":"sum","parameters":{"expression":{"resourceType":"field","valueType":"text","value":"Rule_4_Repeat_Pattern_Amplifier_Flag","dataType":"number","source":"CASE3"}}}],"dimensions":[{"name":"Unified_Individual_Id","label":"Unified Individual Id","resource":{"resourceType":"field","valueType":"text","value":"UnifiedIndividualRISK.ssot__Id__c","dataType":"text","source":"CASE3","isFieldFromRelatedDMO":false},"readOnly":false,"isDynamicWindowField":false}]},"sources":["CASE3"]},"CASE4":{"id":"CASE4","action":"case","parameters":{"cases":[{"name":"Rule_1_Capped_Flag","label":"Rule 1 Capped Flag","returnValueType":"number","whenConditions":[{"expression":{"expressionType":"group","expressionValues":[{"expressionType":"condition","leftOperand":{"resourceType":"field","valueType":"text","source":"AGGREGATE0","value":"Sum_Rule1_Flag","dataType":"number"},"operator":"greater_or_equal","rightOperands":[{"resourceType":"constant","value":1,"valueType":"number"}]}]},"returnValue":{"resourceType":"constant","value":1,"valueType":"number"}}],"elseCondition":{"returnValue":{"resourceType":"constant","value":0,"valueType":"number"}}}]},"sources":["AGGREGATE0"]},"CASE5":{"id":"CASE5","action":"case","parameters":{"cases":[{"name":"Rule_2_Capped_Flag","label":"Rule 2 Capped Flag","returnValueType":"number","whenConditions":[{"expression":{"expressionType":"group","expressionValues":[{"expressionType":"condition","leftOperand":{"resourceType":"field","valueType":"text","source":"CASE4","value":"Sum_Rule2_Flag","dataType":"number"},"operator":"greater_or_equal","rightOperands":[{"resourceType":"constant","value":1,"valueType":"number"}]}]},"returnValue":{"resourceType":"constant","value":1,"valueType":"number"}}],"elseCondition":{"returnValue":{"resourceType":"constant","value":0,"valueType":"number"}}}]},"sources":["CASE4"]},"CASE6":{"id":"CASE6","action":"case","parameters":{"cases":[{"name":"Rule_3_Capped_Flag","label":"Rule 3 Capped Flag","returnValueType":"number","whenConditions":[{"expression":{"expressionType":"group","expressionValues":[{"expressionType":"condition","leftOperand":{"resourceType":"field","valueType":"text","source":"CASE5","value":"Sum_Rule3_Flag","dataType":"number"},"operator":"greater_or_equal","rightOperands":[{"resourceType":"constant","value":1,"valueType":"number"}]}]},"returnValue":{"resourceType":"constant","value":1,"valueType":"number"}}],"elseCondition":{"returnValue":{"resourceType":"constant","value":0,"valueType":"number"}}}]},"sources":["CASE5"]},"CASE7":{"id":"CASE7","action":"case","parameters":{"cases":[{"name":"Rule_4_Capped_Flag","label":"Rule 4 Capped Flag","returnValueType":"number","whenConditions":[{"expression":{"expressionType":"group","expressionValues":[{"expressionType":"condition","leftOperand":{"resourceType":"field","valueType":"text","source":"CASE6","value":"Sum_Rule4_Flag","dataType":"number"},"operator":"greater_or_equal","rightOperands":[{"resourceType":"constant","value":1,"valueType":"number"}]}]},"returnValue":{"resourceType":"constant","value":2,"valueType":"number"}}],"elseCondition":{"returnValue":{"resourceType":"constant","value":0,"valueType":"number"}}}]},"sources":["CASE6"]},"ARITHMETIC_EXPRESSION0":{"id":"ARITHMETIC_EXPRESSION0","action":"arithmetic_expression","parameters":{"expressions":[{"name":"Composite_Risk_Score","label":"Composite Risk Score","expression":[{"expressionType":"operand","resource":{"resourceType":"field","valueType":"text","value":"Rule_1_Capped_Flag","source":"CASE7","dataType":"number"}},{"operator":"add","expressionType":"operator"},{"expressionType":"operand","resource":{"resourceType":"field","valueType":"text","value":"Rule_2_Capped_Flag","source":"CASE7","dataType":"number"}},{"operator":"add","expressionType":"operator"},{"expressionType":"operand","resource":{"resourceType":"field","valueType":"text","value":"Rule_3_Capped_Flag","source":"CASE7","dataType":"number"}},{"operator":"add","expressionType":"operator"},{"expressionType":"operand","resource":{"resourceType":"field","valueType":"text","value":"Rule_4_Capped_Flag","source":"CASE7","dataType":"number"}}]}]},"sources":["CASE7"]}},"ui":{"nodes":{"LOAD_DATA_SOURCE0":{"label":"Individual","type":"LOAD_DATA_SOURCE","top":112,"left":112},"LOAD_DATA_SOURCE1":{"label":"Unified Link Individual RISK","type":"LOAD_DATA_SOURCE","top":252,"left":112},"JOIN0":{"label":"Join","type":"JOIN","top":112,"left":252},"LOAD_DATA_SOURCE2":{"label":"Unified Individual RISK","type":"LOAD_DATA_SOURCE","top":392,"left":112},"JOIN1":{"label":"Join","type":"JOIN","top":112,"left":392},"LOAD_DATA_SOURCE3":{"label":"Banking Transaction","type":"LOAD_DATA_SOURCE","top":532,"left":112},"JOIN2":{"label":"Join","type":"JOIN","top":112,"left":532},"LOAD_DATA_SOURCE4":{"label":"Insurance Claim","type":"LOAD_DATA_SOURCE","top":672,"left":112},"JOIN3":{"label":"Join","type":"JOIN","top":112,"left":672},"CASE0":{"label":"Case","type":"CASE","top":112,"left":812},"CASE1":{"label":"Case","type":"CASE","top":112,"left":952},"CASE2":{"label":"Case","type":"CASE","top":112,"left":1092},"CASE3":{"label":"Case","type":"CASE","top":112,"left":1232},"AGGREGATE0":{"label":"Aggregate","type":"AGGREGATE","top":112,"left":1372},"CASE4":{"label":"Case","type":"CASE","top":112,"left":1512},"CASE5":{"label":"Case","type":"CASE","top":112,"left":1652},"CASE6":{"label":"Case","type":"CASE","top":112,"left":1792},"CASE7":{"label":"Case","type":"CASE","top":112,"left":1932},"ARITHMETIC_EXPRESSION0":{"label":"Arithmetic Expression","type":"ARITHMETIC_EXPRESSION","top":112,"left":2072}},"connectors":[{"targetNodeId":"JOIN0","sourceNodeId":"LOAD_DATA_SOURCE0"},{"targetNodeId":"JOIN0","sourceNodeId":"LOAD_DATA_SOURCE1"},{"targetNodeId":"JOIN1","sourceNodeId":"JOIN0"},{"targetNodeId":"JOIN1","sourceNodeId":"LOAD_DATA_SOURCE2"},{"targetNodeId":"JOIN2","sourceNodeId":"JOIN1"},{"targetNodeId":"JOIN2","sourceNodeId":"LOAD_DATA_SOURCE3"},{"targetNodeId":"JOIN3","sourceNodeId":"JOIN2"},{"targetNodeId":"JOIN3","sourceNodeId":"LOAD_DATA_SOURCE4"},{"targetNodeId":"CASE0","sourceNodeId":"JOIN3"},{"targetNodeId":"CASE1","sourceNodeId":"CASE0"},{"targetNodeId":"CASE2","sourceNodeId":"CASE1"},{"targetNodeId":"CASE3","sourceNodeId":"CASE2"},{"targetNodeId":"AGGREGATE0","sourceNodeId":"CASE3"},{"targetNodeId":"CASE4","sourceNodeId":"AGGREGATE0"},{"targetNodeId":"CASE5","sourceNodeId":"CASE4"},{"targetNodeId":"CASE6","sourceNodeId":"CASE5"},{"targetNodeId":"CASE7","sourceNodeId":"CASE6"},{"targetNodeId":"ARITHMETIC_EXPRESSION0","sourceNodeId":"CASE7"}]},"relatedDMOs":[]}
DataCalcInsightTemplate.expression: SELECT UnifiedssotIndividualRisk__dlm.ssot__Id__c AS unified_individual_id__c, ( CASE WHEN SUM( CASE WHEN ( Banking_Transaction__dlm.Amount__c >= 1.06567E3 and Insurance_Claim__dlm.Days_Policy_Claim__c <> 'more than 30' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN SUM( CASE WHEN ( Banking_Transaction__dlm.Class__c = 1 and ( Insurance_Claim__dlm.AddressChange_Claim__c = 'under 6 months' or Insurance_Claim__dlm.AddressChange_Claim__c = '1 year' ) ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN SUM( CASE WHEN ( Insurance_Claim__dlm.PoliceReportFiled__c = 'No' and Insurance_Claim__dlm.WitnessPresent__c = 'No' and Banking_Transaction__dlm.Class__c = 1 ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN SUM( CASE WHEN ( Insurance_Claim__dlm.PastNumberOfClaims__c = 'more than 4' and Banking_Transaction__dlm.Class__c = 1 ) THEN 2 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 THEN 2 ELSE 0 END) AS composite_risk_score__c FROM ssot__Individual__dlm JOIN UnifiedLinkssotIndividualRisk__dlm ON (ssot__Individual__dlm.ssot__Id__c = UnifiedLinkssotIndividualRisk__dlm.SourceRecordId__c AND ssot__Individual__dlm.KQ_Id__c = UnifiedLinkssotIndividualRisk__dlm.KQ_SourceRecordId__c) JOIN UnifiedssotIndividualRisk__dlm ON (UnifiedLinkssotIndividualRisk__dlm.UnifiedRecordId__c = UnifiedssotIndividualRisk__dlm.ssot__Id__c) JOIN Banking_Transaction__dlm ON (ssot__Individual__dlm.ssot__Id__c = Banking_Transaction__dlm.Customer_Key__c) JOIN Insurance_Claim__dlm ON (ssot__Individual__dlm.ssot__Id__c = Insurance_Claim__dlm.Customer_Key__c) GROUP BY unified_individual_id__c
